# jira2py

> A lightweight, type-safe Python client for the Jira Cloud REST API

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://jira2py.org/installation/index.md)

## User Guide

- [Configuration](https://jira2py.org/guide/configuration/index.md)
- [Error Handling](https://jira2py.org/guide/error-handling/index.md)
- [High-level Helpers](https://jira2py.org/guide/high-level-helpers/index.md)
- [Rate Limiting](https://jira2py.org/guide/rate-limiting/index.md)

## API Reference

- [Overview](https://jira2py.org/api/index.md)
- [Attachments](https://jira2py.org/api/attachments/index.md)
- [Exceptions](https://jira2py.org/api/exceptions/index.md)
- [Filters](https://jira2py.org/api/filters/index.md)
- [High-level Helpers](https://jira2py.org/api/helpers/index.md)
- [Issue Comments](https://jira2py.org/api/issue-comments/index.md)
- [Issue Fields](https://jira2py.org/api/issue-fields/index.md)
- [Issue Links](https://jira2py.org/api/issue-links/index.md)
- [Issue Search](https://jira2py.org/api/issue-search/index.md)
- [Issue Worklogs](https://jira2py.org/api/issue-worklogs/index.md)
- [Issues](https://jira2py.org/api/issues/index.md)
- [JiraAPI](https://jira2py.org/api/jira-api/index.md)
- [Metadata](https://jira2py.org/api/metadata/index.md)
- [Projects](https://jira2py.org/api/projects/index.md)
- [Users](https://jira2py.org/api/users/index.md)
